511.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'The likeness of the five obligatory prayers is like a flowing, fresh river at the door of one of you, in which he bathes five times every day.'
511.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Perumpamaan shalat-shalat wajib adalah seperti sungai yang mengalir, bersih, di depan pintu salah seorang dari kalian, yang ia mandi darinya lima kali setiap hari.'

512.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'What do you think: if there were a river at the door of one of you in which he bathes five times a day, would it leave any filth on him?' They said: 'No, it would not leave any filth.' He said: 'That is the likeness of the five daily prayers; through them Allah wipes away sins.'
512.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Bagaimana pendapat kalian: jika ada sungai di depan pintu salah seorang dari kalian yang ia mandi darinya lima kali sehari, apakah masih tersisa kotoran padanya?' Mereka berkata: 'Tidak.' Beliau bersabda: 'Begitulah perumpamaan shalat lima waktu; dengannya Allah menghapus dosa-dosa.'

513.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he was asked about prayer times during the era of al-Hajjaj, who used to delay the prayers. Jabir said: 'The Prophet ﷺ used to pray Dhuhr when the sun had passed its meridian, Asr while the sun was still high and clear, Maghrib when the sun had set, and Isha — sometimes he would hasten it and sometimes delay it: when the people had gathered he would hasten it, and when they were late he would delay it — and Fajr he used to pray in the darkness before dawn.'
513.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia ditanya tentang waktu-waktu shalat di masa al-Hajjaj yang biasa mengakhirkan shalat. Jabir berkata: 'Nabi ﷺ biasa shalat Dhuhur ketika matahari telah condong, Ashar ketika matahari masih tinggi dan terang, Maghrib ketika matahari telah terbenam, dan Isya — kadang beliau menyegerakannya dan kadang mengakhirkannya: jika orang-orang telah berkumpul beliau menyegerakannya, jika mereka terlambat beliau mengakhirkannya — dan Subuh beliau shalat dalam kegelapan sebelum fajar.'

514.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Shihab that Umar ibn Abd al-Aziz once delayed the prayer, and Urwah ibn al-Zubayr came to him and told him that al-Mughirah ibn Shubah had once delayed the prayer, and Abu Masud al-Ansari entered upon him and said: 'What is this, O Mughirah? Has Jibril not come down and prayed, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ prayed with him, then again, and again — and he said: I was commanded to do this.'
514.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Shihab bahwa Umar ibn Abd al-Aziz pernah mengakhirkan shalat, lalu Urwah ibn al-Zubayr masuk menemuinya dan memberitahunya bahwa al-Mughirah ibn Shubah pernah mengakhirkan shalat, kemudian Abu Masud al-Ansari masuk dan berkata: 'Apa ini wahai Mughirah? Bukankah Jibril telah turun dan shalat, dan Rasulullah ﷺ shalat bersamanya, lalu lagi dan lagi — dan beliau bersabda: Aku diperintahkan demikian.'

515.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aishah (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray Asr while the sun was still in her room, before it climbed above the top of the walls.
515.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aishah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat Ashar sementara matahari masih berada di dalam kamarnya, sebelum naik melewati atas dinding.

516.iwh_en: It was narrated that when the Messenger of Allah ﷺ arrived in Madinah, he used to gather the people for prayer at the proper times without a muadhdhin — by beating a drum or blowing a horn. Then Abdullah ibn Zayd al-Ansari saw the adhan in a dream and came to the Prophet ﷺ to tell him about it.
516.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa ketika Rasulullah ﷺ tiba di Madinah, beliau mengumpulkan orang-orang untuk shalat pada waktunya tanpa muadzin — dengan memukul gendang atau meniup tanduk. Kemudian Abdullah ibn Zaid al-Ansari bermimpi tentang adzan dan datang menceritakannya kepada Nabi ﷺ.

517.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'Indeed Bilal gives the adhan at night, so eat and drink until Ibn Umm Maktum gives the adhan.'
517.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya Bilal mengumandangkan adzan di malam hari, maka makan dan minumlah hingga Ibn Umm Maktum mengumandangkan adzan.'

518.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aishah (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ had two muadhdhins: Bilal and Ibn Umm Maktum. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Indeed Bilal gives the adhan at night, so eat and drink until you hear the adhan of Ibn Umm Maktum.'
518.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aishah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ memiliki dua muadzin: Bilal dan Ibn Umm Maktum. Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya Bilal mengumandangkan adzan di malam hari, maka makan dan minumlah hingga kalian mendengar adzan Ibn Umm Maktum.'

519.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hafs ibn Umar ibn Sad the muadhdhin that Sa'd used to give the adhan in the mosque of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. Hafs said: 'My family told me that Bilal came to Sa'd and said: You have gone beyond the proper time.'
519.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hafs ibn Umar ibn Sa'd al-Muadzin bahwa Sa'd biasa mengumandangkan adzan di masjid Rasulullah ﷺ. Hafs berkata: 'Keluargaku memberitahuku bahwa Bilal datang kepada Sa'd dan berkata: Kamu telah melampaui waktumu.'

520.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the adhan in the time of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was said two phrases at a time, and the iqamah was said once, except that Hayya ala al-salah was said twice.
520.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa adzan di masa Rasulullah ﷺ diucapkan dua kali-dua kali, dan iqamah diucapkan sekali, kecuali ucapan Hayya ala al-shalah yang diucapkan dua kali.

521.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that Bilal was commanded to say the adhan in double phrases and the iqamah in single phrases.
521.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Bilal diperintahkan untuk mengumandangkan adzan dua kali-dua kali dan iqamah satu kali-satu kali.

522.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that Bilal was commanded to say the adhan in double phrases and the iqamah in single phrases, except for Qad qamat al-salah.
522.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Bilal diperintahkan untuk mengumandangkan adzan dua kali-dua kali dan iqamah satu kali-satu kali, kecuali Qad qamat al-shalah.

523.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Mahdhura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ commanded about twenty men to give the adhan, and the voice of Abu Mahdhura pleased him, so he taught him the adhan himself.
523.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Mahdhura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkan sekitar dua puluh orang untuk mengumandangkan adzan, dan suara Abu Mahdhura menyenangkan beliau, maka beliau mengajarinya adzan sendiri.

524.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Mahdhura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ commanded him to give the adhan, and taught him the adhan, saying: 'Allahu Akbar, Allahu Akbar' — raising his voice with the double testimony of faith, then lowering it.
524.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Mahdhura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkannya untuk mengumandangkan adzan dan mengajarinya adzan, seraya bersabda: 'Allahu Akbar, Allahu Akbar' — sambil mengeraskan suara dengan syahadatain dua kali, kemudian merendahkannya.

525.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Juhaifa (may Allah be pleased with him) that he saw Bilal giving the adhan and turning his face from side to side with the adhan.
525.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Juhaifa (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia melihat Bilal mengumandangkan adzan sambil memutar wajahnya ke sana-sini saat adzan.

526.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Juhaifa (may Allah be pleased with him) that Bilal planted a staff in the ground, then gave the adhan, placing his fingers in his ears, and turning around during his adhan.
526.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Juhaifa (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Bilal menancapkan tongkat di tanah, kemudian mengumandangkan adzan, meletakkan jari-jarinya di telinganya, dan berputar selama adzannya.

527.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sad (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'Two things are never rejected: supplication at the time of the adhan, and supplication at the time of rain.'
527.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sad (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Dua hal yang tidak pernah ditolak: doa pada saat adzan, dan doa pada saat hujan.'

528.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Said al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'When you hear the muadhdhin, say what he says.'
528.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Said al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila kalian mendengar muadzin, ucapkanlah seperti yang ia ucapkan.'

529.iwh_en: It was narrated from Isa ibn Talhah that he entered upon Muawiyah when the muadhdhin called out: 'Allahu Akbar, Allahu Akbar,' and Muawiyah said: 'Allahu Akbar, Allahu Akbar.' The muadhdhin said: 'Ashhadu alla ilaha illa Allah,' and Muawiyah said likewise, until the adhan was complete, then Muawiyah said: 'I heard your Prophet ﷺ say this.'
529.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Isa ibn Talhah bahwa ia masuk menemui Muawiyah ketika muadzin mengucapkan: 'Allahu Akbar, Allahu Akbar,' dan Muawiyah mengucapkan: 'Allahu Akbar, Allahu Akbar.' Muadzin mengucapkan: 'Asyhadu alla ilaha illallah,' dan Muawiyah mengucapkan yang sama, hingga adzan selesai, lalu Muawiyah berkata: 'Aku mendengar Nabi kalian ﷺ mengucapkan demikian.'

530.iwh_en: It was narrated that when the muadhdhin said: 'Hayya ala al-salah,' Muawiyah said: 'La hawla wa la quwwata illa billah,' then he said: 'Thus I heard your Prophet ﷺ say this.'
530.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa ketika muadzin mengucapkan: 'Hayya ala al-shalah,' Muawiyah mengucapkan: 'La hawla wa la quwwata illa billah,' kemudian ia berkata: 'Demikianlah aku mendengar Nabi kalian ﷺ mengucapkan ini.'

531.iwh_en: It was narrated from the grandfather of Muhammad ibn Amr that Muawiyah heard the muadhdhin say: 'Allahu Akbar, Allahu Akbar,' and Muawiyah said: 'Allahu Akbar, Allahu Akbar.' The muadhdhin continued phrase by phrase and Muawiyah repeated each phrase, following along completely until the adhan was finished.
531.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari kakek Muhammad ibn Amr bahwa Muawiyah mendengar muadzin mengucapkan: 'Allahu Akbar, Allahu Akbar,' dan Muawiyah mengucapkan: 'Allahu Akbar, Allahu Akbar.' Muadzin melanjutkan kalimat demi kalimat dan Muawiyah mengulangi setiap kalimat hingga adzan selesai.

532.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'When the call to prayer is made, Satan turns around with flatulence so that he does not hear the adhan. When the adhan is finished, he comes back. When the iqamah is made, he turns around again. When the iqamah is finished, he comes back and whispers between the person and his own self, saying: 'Remember such-and-such, remember such-and-such,' reminding him of things he had not thought of before, until the man does not know how many rak'ahs he has prayed.'
532.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila adzan dikumandangkan, setan berpaling dengan kentut agar ia tidak mendengar adzan. Ketika adzan selesai, ia kembali. Ketika iqamah dikumandangkan, ia berpaling lagi. Ketika iqamah selesai, ia kembali dan berbisik di antara seseorang dan dirinya sendiri, berkata: 'Ingatlah ini dan itu,' mengingatkannya tentang hal-hal yang sebelumnya tidak ia ingat, hingga orang tersebut tidak tahu berapa rakaat yang telah ia shalat.'

533.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Sha'tha al-Muharibi that Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) saw a man leave the mosque after the muadhdhin had called the adhan, and said: 'As for this one, he has disobeyed Abu al-Qasim ﷺ.'
533.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Sya'tsa al-Muharibi bahwa Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melihat seorang pria keluar dari masjid setelah muadzin mengumandangkan adzan, dan berkata: 'Orang ini telah mendurhakai Abu al-Qasim ﷺ.'

534.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'the Prophet ﷺ went out when the sun had declined and led them in Dhuhr prayer.'
534.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Nabi ﷺ keluar ketika matahari telah condong dan mengimami mereka dalam shalat Dhuhur.'

535.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'When the heat is intense, delay the prayer until it cools down, for the intensity of heat is from the scorching breath of Hell.'
535.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila panas sangat menyengat, tundalah shalat hingga sejuk, karena sesungguhnya panasnya panas adalah dari uap Jahannam.'

536.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray Asr, and then a person going to al-Awali would arrive there while the sun was still high.'
536.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat Ashar, kemudian seseorang yang pergi ke al-Awali akan tiba di sana sementara matahari masih tinggi.'

537.iwh_en: It was narrated from Salamah ibn al-Akwa (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ used to pray Maghrib at the moment the sun set, when its upper limb had disappeared.
537.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Salamah ibn al-Akwa (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa shalat Maghrib pada saat matahari terbenam, ketika tepi atasnya telah menghilang.

538.iwh_en: It was narrated from Al-Abbas ibn Abd al-Muttalib (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'My ummah will continue to be in goodness as long as they do not wait for Maghrib until the stars appear.'
538.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Al-Abbas ibn Abd al-Muttalib (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Umatku akan senantiasa berada dalam kebaikan selama mereka tidak menunggu Maghrib hingga bintang-bintang muncul.'

539.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Nu'man ibn Bashir (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'By Allah, I am the most knowledgeable of people about the time of this prayer' — meaning Isha — 'for the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray it when the moon set on the third night.'
539.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Nu'man ibn Basyir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Demi Allah, aku adalah orang yang paling mengetahui tentang waktu shalat ini' — yakni Isya — 'karena Rasulullah ﷺ biasa melaksanakannya ketika bulan ketiga terbenam.'

540.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ once delayed the Isha prayer until nearly a third of the night had passed. He came out and found people sleeping and awake in small groups and circles. He was displeased and said: 'If a man were to call the people and say' — and Amr said: 'summon' — 'that Isha prayer is only performed by the hypocrites, I would command with it.'
540.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ pernah mengakhirkan shalat Isya hingga hampir sepertiga malam berlalu. Beliau keluar dan mendapati orang-orang ada yang tidur dan ada yang duduk dalam kelompok-kelompok kecil dan lingkaran-lingkaran. Beliau tidak senang dan bersabda: 'Jika seseorang memanggil orang-orang dan berkata' — dan Amr berkata: 'menyeru' — 'bahwa shalat Isya hanya dikerjakan oleh orang-orang munafik, niscaya aku akan memerintahkan dengannya.'

541.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aishah (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ delayed Isha until Umar ibn al-Khattab called out: 'The women and children have gone to sleep.' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ came out and said: 'There is no one on earth who prays this prayer except you.' — At that time, no one else prayed it.
541.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aishah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ mengakhirkan Isya hingga Umar ibn al-Khattab berseru: 'Para wanita dan anak-anak telah tertidur.' Rasulullah ﷺ keluar dan bersabda: 'Tidak ada seorang pun di bumi yang shalat ini kecuali kalian.' — Saat itu, tidak ada orang lain yang melaksanakannya.

542.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aishah (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ once delayed Isha prayer one night until most of the night had passed and the people of the mosque had gone to sleep. He came out and prayed it, then said: 'This is indeed its proper time, were it not that I would cause hardship to my ummah.'
542.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aishah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ pernah mengakhirkan shalat Isya satu malam hingga sebagian besar malam berlalu dan orang-orang di masjid telah tertidur. Beliau keluar dan mengerjakannya, kemudian bersabda: 'Inilah sebenarnya waktunya, seandainya aku tidak akan memberatkan umatku.'

543.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'the Messenger of Allah ﷺ once delayed the prayer one night. It was said: 'O Messenger of Allah, the prayer — the women and children have gone to sleep.' He came out wiping water from his side and said: 'This is its proper time, were it not that I would burden my ummah.''
543.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Rasulullah ﷺ pernah mengakhirkan shalat satu malam. Dikatakan: 'Wahai Rasulullah, shalat — para wanita dan anak-anak telah tidur.' Beliau keluar sambil mengusap air dari sisinya dan bersabda: 'Inilah waktunya, seandainya aku tidak akan memberatkan umatku.''

544.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aishah (may Allah be pleased with her) that the wives of the Prophet ﷺ used to pray Fajr with the Prophet ﷺ, then return wrapped in their garments without being recognized.
544.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aishah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa para istri Nabi ﷺ biasa shalat Subuh bersama Nabi ﷺ, kemudian kembali sambil berselimutkan pakaian mereka tanpa dikenali.

545.iwh_en: It was narrated from Rafi ibn Khadij (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'Perform the Fajr prayer in full light, for that earns the greatest reward.'
545.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Rafi ibn Khadij (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Kerjakanlah shalat Subuh dalam cahaya terang, karena hal itu mendatangkan pahala yang lebih besar.'

546.iwh_en: It was narrated from Rafi ibn Khadij (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'Brighten the Fajr prayer, for that earns the greatest reward.'
546.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Rafi ibn Khadij (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sinarilah shalat Fajar, karena hal itu mendatangkan pahala yang lebih besar.'

547.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'Whoever catches one rak'ah of a prayer has caught the prayer.'
547.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang mendapati satu rakaat dari suatu shalat, maka ia telah mendapati shalat tersebut.'

548.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'Whoever catches one rak'ah of Fajr before the sun rises has caught Fajr, and whoever catches one rak'ah of Asr before the sun sets has caught Asr.'
548.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang mendapati satu rakaat Subuh sebelum matahari terbit, maka ia telah mendapati Subuh, dan barangsiapa yang mendapati satu rakaat Ashar sebelum matahari terbenam, maka ia telah mendapati Ashar.'

549.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Said al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'When you see a man who regularly frequents the mosque, bear witness to his faith, for Allah says: 'Only those who believe in Allah and the Last Day maintain the mosques of Allah.' (At-Tawbah 9:18)'
549.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Said al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila kalian melihat seorang pria yang biasa mengunjungi masjid, bersaksilah atas imannya, karena Allah berfirman: 'Sesungguhnya yang memakmurkan masjid-masjid Allah hanyalah orang-orang yang beriman kepada Allah dan Hari Akhir.' (At-Taubah 9:18)'

550.iwh_en: It was narrated from Uthman ibn Affan (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'Whoever prays Isha in congregation is as if he prayed half the night, and whoever prays Fajr in congregation is as if he prayed the whole night.'
550.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Uthman ibn Affan (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang shalat Isya berjamaah, seolah-olah ia shalat separuh malam, dan barangsiapa yang shalat Subuh berjamaah, seolah-olah ia shalat semalam penuh.'

551.iwh_en: It was narrated from the owner of this house — pointing to the house of Abdullah ibn Masud — that he asked the Prophet ﷺ: 'Which deed is most virtuous or most beloved to Allah?' He said: 'Prayer performed at its proper time.'
551.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari pemilik rumah ini — sambil menunjuk rumah Abdullah ibn Masud — bahwa ia bertanya kepada Nabi ﷺ: 'Amalan apakah yang paling utama atau paling dicintai Allah?' Beliau menjawab: 'Shalat yang dikerjakan pada waktunya.'

552.iwh_en: It was narrated from Kab ibn Ujrah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ came out to seven of them in the mosque — three Arabs and four freed slaves, or four Arabs and three freed slaves — and said to them: 'Have you appointed a leader among you?' They said: 'No.' He said: 'Appoint one of you as your leader.' They appointed the youngest among them.
552.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ka'b ibn Ujrah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ keluar menemui tujuh orang di antara mereka di masjid — tiga orang Arab dan empat orang mawali, atau empat orang Arab dan tiga orang mawali — dan bersabda kepada mereka: 'Apakah kalian telah menunjuk seorang pemimpin?' Mereka berkata: 'Belum.' Beliau bersabda: 'Tunjuklah salah seorang dari kalian sebagai pemimpin.' Mereka menunjuk yang paling muda di antara mereka.

553.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to him: 'How will you be when you remain among people who delay the prayer from its proper time?' He said: 'Allah and His Messenger know best.' He said: 'Pray the prayer at its proper time, then if the prayer is established while you are in the mosque, pray with them.'
553.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda kepadanya: 'Bagaimana keadaanmu apabila kamu tetap bersama orang-orang yang mengakhirkan shalat dari waktunya?' Ia berkata: 'Allah dan Rasul-Nya lebih mengetahui.' Beliau bersabda: 'Kerjakanlah shalat pada waktunya, kemudian jika shalat didirikan sementara kamu berada di masjid, shalatlah bersama mereka.'

554.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'O Abu Dharr, what will you do when you encounter rulers who delay the prayer from its proper time? I said: 'What do you command me, O Messenger of Allah?' He said: 'Pray the prayer at its proper time, and make your prayer with them a supererogatory prayer.''
554.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Wahai Abu Dzar, apa yang akan kamu lakukan jika kamu menemui para pemimpin yang mengakhirkan shalat dari waktunya? Aku berkata: 'Apa yang engkau perintahkan kepadaku wahai Rasulullah?' Beliau bersabda: 'Kerjakanlah shalat pada waktunya, dan jadikanlah shalatmu bersama mereka sebagai shalat sunnah.''

555.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'Whoever forgets a prayer or sleeps through it, let him pray it when he remembers it, for Allah says: 'Establish prayer for My remembrance.' (Ta-Ha 20:14)'
555.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang lupa shalat atau tertidur dari shalat, maka hendaklah ia mengerjakannya ketika ia mengingatnya, karena Allah berfirman: 'Dirikanlah shalat untuk mengingat-Ku.' (Tha Ha 20:14)'

556.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that he raised it (to the Prophet ﷺ) who said: 'Whoever misses Asr prayer is as if he has lost his family and wealth.'
556.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia merafa'kannya (kepada Nabi ﷺ) yang bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang melewatkan shalat Ashar, seolah-olah ia telah kehilangan keluarga dan hartanya.'

557.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'Whoever misses Asr prayer is as if he has lost his family and children.'
557.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang melewatkan shalat Ashar, seolah-olah ia telah kehilangan keluarga dan anaknya.'

558.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ali ibn Abi Talib (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'on the Day of the Trench: 'May Allah fill their graves and houses with fire, just as they kept us from the middle prayer until the sun set.''
558.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ali ibn Abi Talib (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'pada Hari Perang Khandaq: 'Semoga Allah memenuhi kubur-kubur dan rumah-rumah mereka dengan api, sebagaimana mereka mencegah kami dari shalat wustha hingga matahari terbenam.''

559.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'Between a person and shirk and kufr is only the abandonment of prayer.'
559.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Antara seseorang dengan syirik dan kufur hanyalah meninggalkan shalat.'

560.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the people were praying Fajr in Quba when a man came and said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ has received revelation and has been commanded to face the Kaaba, so face it.' Their faces had been toward Syria, so they turned and faced the Kaaba.
560.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa orang-orang sedang shalat Subuh di Quba ketika seorang pria datang dan berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ telah menerima wahyu dan diperintahkan untuk menghadap Ka'bah, maka menghadaplah ke sana.' Wajah mereka tadinya menghadap Syria, maka mereka berbalik dan menghadap Ka'bah.
